title: FlowDSL Node Registry
description: Schema for node-registry.yaml — lists available FlowDSL node handlers per service, mapping operationId to runtime handler, language, invocation mode, and version.

registry.description: The node registry schema version this document uses.

info.description: Metadata about this node registry document.

version.description: Version of this registry document (semver recommended).

description.description: Optional description of what services or domains this registry covers.

services.description: Map of service names to their node handler registrations. Keys are service names.

ServiceRegistry.description: All node handlers registered by a single service.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for http-invoked nodes in this service.

language.description: Default implementation language for nodes in this service. Can be overridden per node.

nodes.description: Map of operationId to node handler registration. Keys are operationId values (snake_case).

tags.description: Tags for grouping services in the Studio registry browser.

NodeRegistration.description: A single node handler registration — maps an operationId to its runtime implementation.

handler.description: Fully-qualified handler path or class name. Format depends on language.

language.description: Implementation language. Overrides the service-level default if set.

invocation.description: How the runtime invokes this node handler.

version.description: Version of this node handler implementation (semver recommended).

description.description: Human-readable description of what this node does.

image.description: Optional container image for isolated node execution.

endpoint.description: Full URL for http or grpc invocation. Overrides service-level baseUrl.

deprecated.description: Whether this handler is deprecated. Deprecated handlers will be flagged in Studio.

deprecationMessage.description: Optional message explaining why this handler is deprecated and what to use instead.

tags.description: Tags for filtering in the Studio registry browser.

Extension.description: Vendor extension field. Any value is permitted under x-* keys.
